The '''New Republic Honor Guard''' was a military force appointed by the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|Combined Defense Forces of the New Republic]] to perform ceremonial duties to high ranking [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] officials and dignitaries. Units were stationed aboard diplomatic ships and locations, including the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] and locations visited by the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]].

Members included [[Ssyrmik]], [[Shreel]], and [[Marcopius]], and often attended the [[New Republic Fleet Academy]].

The Guard was the succeeding unit of the [[Rebel Honor Guard/Legends|Rebel Honor Guard]], and possibly the [[Alliance Elite Guard]], who preformed the same role for [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
